title: Congress Alleges AAP is 'Party of Billionaires', Accuses It of Selling Rajya Sabha Seats as Seven MPs Switch to BJP
description: The Congress slammed the AAP, claiming that its "mask is off" after 7 of its MPs crossed over to the BJP. Senior Congress leader Ajay Maken alleged that AAP has functioned as a "party of billionaires" that allegedly distributed Rajya Sabha seats based on money rather than ideology or public service.
